creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192431
py-flex-6.13.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-flex from 6.13.0 to 6.13.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- Extend supported version range for `click`

See also: https://github.com/pipermerriam/flex/blob/v6.13.1/CHANGELOG

QA:
~~~

- portlint -> OK
